text: Within the sleek glass and orderly corridors, I sense a quiet detachment. These empty seats and stark lights are brimming with potential conversation, yet silence prevails. Stepping into the more vibrant second room, I am confronted with words that mirror my own internal musings—there is a certain vulnerability here, an openness that both invites reflection and amplifies self-consciousness. I feel like both subject and observer, exposed in thought yet searching for meaning and connection amid the curated stimuli. It is a mixture of curiosity, unease, and philosophical contemplation.
